text: Bringing a new pet into your home is such a tender thing to do. You are opening your life to a creature who will trust you completely, and that trust is one of the most genuine gifts in the world. However they came to find you, they are lucky to have someone willing to give them a safe place, steady care, and real love. Enjoy every quiet moment together, even the messy ones. They will find their way into your heart faster than you expect.
